summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-12, REQ-13, REQ-14) with good coverage. A dedicated useCurrency hook/context is created, a currency toggle is added to the header, localStorage persistence with INR default is implemented, the INR_TO_USD_RATE constant is defined in a single file, and price-displaying components (ProductCard, ProductDetails, Cart, Checkout, Wishlist) all consume formatPrice. No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features were found.
